subcodes.first_line: The Divine Manifestation is clear and evident to such a degree that were all who dwell on earth, without ulterior motive, to examine the signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ظهور الهی واضح و مبرهن است بقسمیکه اگر جمیع من علی الارض من دون غرض در آثار
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prophecy and fulfillment
